title: Subsampling Ethanol Preservative from Zooplankton Museum Collections for DNA Extractions
author: Andreas Novotny

steps.title: To re suspend DNA in the...
steps.instruction: To re suspend DNA in the zooplankton sample, invert the sample jar three times.

steps.title: Use a serological pipette to remove...
steps.instruction: Use a serological pipette to remove 50 ml of the ethanol preservative, and transfer to a 50 mL falcon tube.

steps.title: Use a syringe to push the...
steps.instruction: Use a syringe to push the ethanol through a Sterivex Filter (0.2 um) Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #SVGPL10RC .

steps.title: Seal the outflow of the filter with parafilm
steps.instruction: Seal the outflow of the filter with parafilm.

steps.title: Seal the inflow opening with parafilm
steps.instruction: Seal the inflow opening with parafilm.

steps.title: Label filter units and store them...
steps.instruction: Label filter units and store them at -80°C for downstream DNA extraction.

steps.title: Prepare Sucrose Lysis Buffer (SLB)
steps.instruction: Prepare Sucrose Lysis Buffer (SLB): Sucrose lysis buffer by Andreas Novotny

steps.title: Follow the same extraction procedures as...
steps.instruction: Follow the same extraction procedures as for Environmental DNA: DNA Extraction from 0.22µm Sterivex Filters - Phenol-Chloroform by Andreas Novotny

steps.title: Alternative extraction method
steps.instruction: Alternative extraction method: DNA Extraction from 0.22µm Sterivex Filters - Qiagen Blood and Tissue Kit by Andreas Novotny
